name: Queen Butterfly Danaus
name_jp: クイーン・バタフライ ダナウス
desc: If you control this Normal Summoned/Set card (Quick Effect): You can target up to 3 Level 4 or lower Insect monsters in your GY; change this card's ATK to 0, and if you do, Special Summon those monsters, but their effects are negated. You can only use this effect of "Queen Butterfly Danaus" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control this Normal Summoned/Set card (Quick Effect): You can target up to 3 Level 4 or lower Insect monsters in your GY; change this card's ATK to 0, and if you do, Special Summon those monsters, but their effects are negated. You can only use this effect of "Queen Butterfly Danaus" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
